rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 8, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing required to address how plaintiff can amend to allege in good faith facts to estalish a valid contract and particularity as to fraud which are absent in the Third Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ROBERTO PENA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of First Amended Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 8, 2012, line 2 - PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion For Entry Of First Amended Judgment. Off Calendar, untimely CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ELIZABETH JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 8, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. 1) Grant, subject to opposition, as to defendants Young and Johnson; 2) Hearing required re defendant Jones. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSHUA R ZIMMERMANN et al VS. YVONNE CASILLAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 8, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT YVONNE CASILLAS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, triable issue of material fact re: 1) relocation payment, see plaintiff's Separate Statement page 2 disputed issue number 5; 2) Effect of Amended Notice of Intent to Withdraw, see plaintiff's Separate Statement page 2 issues numbers 6, 7 and 8. = (501/REQ)
